node_2: local shading models and shadow maps
edge: Using differentiable rasterization with local shading models and shadow maps bridges the gap between efficient differentiable renderers and renderers based on path tracing and Monte Carlo methods for light transport modeling.
The use of co-located camera and light in shadow art allows users to interactively modify the shadow of the reference object and apply real-time deformation to the mesh.

Apart from shadows, various effects of global illumination like ambient occlusion have been recreated by efficient real-time approximations
Global illumination effects such as reflections and refractions can be recreated by efficient real-time approximations similar to the approach mentioned in the context
